sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32003" key="e)kqeologe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκθεολογέω</orth>, <sense id="n32003.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">attribute to the Deity,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἡ τοῦ παντὸς ἐκτεθεολόγηται γένεσις</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1414.tlg001:40" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heraclit.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">All.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">40</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
